Ejemplos de esto: Terret Polanco, Prado Sur 250, Parques Polanco, el primer proyecto de usos mixtos de la Ciudad de México y el destacado desarrollo Rubén Darío 225. Hoy nos encontramos en un profundo proceso de evolución a través de nuestra expansión internacional, lo cual nos permitirá desarrollar, con nuestra experiencia y conocimiento, proyectos de gran envergadura, ahora también en un nivel global.

Mr Ordorica is a strong strategic thinker, with more than 30 years of hands-on experience in real estate finance, investments and investment management. He is a world-class risk manager and executive - highly regarded for his judgment and integrity.

Currently, Mr Ordorica is President of MEXROB Capital and Chief Executive Officer of ALIGNMEX Real Estate Capital. MEXROB Capital is a private investment firm focused solely on real estate. ALIGNMEX provides real estate investment and asset management services in Mexico. Under Mr Ordorica's leadership, ALIGNMEX offers an integrated and forward looking solution to local and foreign institutional real estate investors interested in capitalizing on the opportunities offered by the Mexican real estate market. In ALIGNMEX, clients benefit from having an experienced local firm with a global mindset that is dynamically managed to reflect the realities of changing market conditions. Moreover, ALIGNMEX stands for “alignment”, a principle that is deeply rooted in the foundation of the Company.

Prior to establishing MEXROB Capital and co-founding ALIGNMEX, Mr Ordorica was the CEO of PREI Latin America, the Latin America real estate investment and advisory business of Prudential Financial, which under his leadership sponsored 8 funds, had an active presence in Mexico, Brazil, Chile, Argentina and Peru and invested more than US$8 billion in Latin America, between 2001 and 2012. Before joining PREI Latin America, Mr Ordorica was the Senior Latin America Advisor and Head of the Latin America team in the Global Real Estate Investment Banking Group at JPMorgan.

Mr Ordorica's professional and academic achievements have been recognized by his appointed membership to the Mexican Society for Geography and Statistics. In 2006, Real Estate Forum also named Mr Ordorica among the next generation of leaders in the global real estate industry, focusing on real estate professionals under 40.

payload.summary:
Soy Tijuanense de corazón y también San Dieguina pues he crecido y me he formado en ambas partes de la frontera.
Mi padre el Arq. Hector Castellanos me heredo su pasión por buscar un mundo justo por respetar la vida y la dignidad de las personas y siempre
Ser agradecida de todo. Su pasión por planear las ciudades lo hizo crear la Dirección de Planeación y desarrollo Urbano en Tijuana en 1989 cuando
Entra después de 70 años del mismo partido. En que entonces y todavía en ciertas partes pagaban mas predial las casas de Infonavit que las
Casas de zona dorada. Su entrega por nuestro país fue ardua y me inspiro su amor por construir ciudades mas humanas donde las personas se desarrollen integralmente. De ahi mi pasión por construir una ciudad para todos, donde las personas puedan caminar y vayan construyéndose espacios mas seguros y vibrantes. Gracias al gran espíritu de servicio que mis padres siempre tuvieron hacia las escuelas donde sus hijos estudiábamos, la colonia donde vivíamos, la iglesia donde asistíamos y la ciudad y nuestro estado, a mi se me abrieron muchas puertas para empezar mi carrera como asesor inmobiliario creando mi empresa hoy Probien.mx
Soy una persona transparente y me conecto muy bien con las personas. Busco cómo apoyarlos en lo que veo que necesitan. Muchas veces los clientes no saben que quieren o por donde empezar, pero gracias a que tengo tantas hijas que he pasado por tantas experiencias puedo apoyar a las familias con lo que respecta al tema de encontrarles un nuevo hogar y ayudarlos a cerrar y abrir nuevos capítulos en sus vidas.
En la parte Comercial hoy llevamos poco mas de un año armando con los propietarios de la tierra un desarrollo que esperamos sea la punta de lanza para que otros desarrollos que vengan ofrezcan lo mismo. Una Comunidad Vibrante y dinámica donde sus residentes y las personas que trabajen ahi se les abran oportunidades para desenvolverse y realizar sus proyectos. Una comunidad que habite un edificio abierto y funcional con calidad de estándares internacionales. Ya casi viene a ustedes Torre Correos Communitiy que viene a “Honrar un legado en Tijuana”

Nuestros agentes de IA son soluciones personalizadas que automatizan tareas, optimizan procesos y brindan insights valiosos, permitiendo a las empresas mejorar la eficiencia, reducir costos y tomar decisiones más informadas. Nuestra misión es ayudar a las empresas a liberar su potencial mediante la automatización inteligente, transformando operaciones tradicionales en sistemas ágiles, rápidos y más efectivos.

¿Por qué elegirnos?
	•	Soluciones personalizadas: Entendemos los desafíos específicos de cada industria y diseñamos agentes de IA que se alinean perfectamente con sus necesidades.
	•	Automatización inteligente: Desde tareas repetitivas hasta procesos complejos, nuestros agentes optimizan cada parte del negocio.
	•	Impacto real: No solo hablamos de IA, sino de resultados concretos que mejoran la productividad, ahorran tiempo y aumentan la rentabilidad.

Únete a la revolución de la inteligencia artificial. En Agentesinteligentes.mx, estamos listos para ayudarte a resolver lo que parece imposible.

payload.summary:
Bringing together a diverse background spanning continents and industries, Ian is a seasoned realtor renowned for orchestrating successful property transactions in the breathtaking landscape of La Paz, BCS, Mexico. With an illustrious career spanning four years in the local real estate scene, he has established an unparalleled reputation for delivering exceptional service, forging lasting client relationships, and consistently exceeding expectations.

Since establishing roots in La Paz, Ian has become synonymous with excellence in the local real estate market. Armed with an intimate understanding of the region's unique dynamics, he has navigated clients through the intricacies of property transactions, from luxury waterfront villas to quaint countryside retreats. With an unwavering commitment to client satisfaction and a keen eye for opportunity, Ian has facilitated numerous successful deals, earning accolades for professionalism, integrity, and unparalleled market insight.

Prior to making waves in the real estate world, Ian made significant strides in the maritime industry, spearheading marketing divisions for two prestigious cruise lines. Drawing upon a foundation of strategic vision and innovative thinking, he played a pivotal role in shaping brand identity, expanding market reach, and driving revenue growth. Whether conceptualizing captivating campaigns or cultivating partnerships with industry influencers like Rolex, Cartier, and HUBLOT, Ian demonstrated an innate ability to elevate brands to new heights, leaving an indelible mark on the cruise industry landscape.

Rooted in Canada until the age of 23, Ian embarked on a transformative journey that took him across the globe. For three exhilarating years, he embraced the thrill of the unknown as a scuba instructor, immersing himself in diverse cultures, landscapes, and communities. This enriching experience not only honed Ian's interpersonal skills but also instilled a profound appreciation for exploration, discovery, and the boundless opportunities that lie beyond one's comfort zone.

A trailblazer in both real estate and marketing realms, Ian epitomizes the fusion of passion, expertise, and relentless dedication. From the sun-kissed shores of La Paz to the high seas of global commerce, he continues to redefine success, leaving an indelible legacy of excellence, integrity, and boundless possibility.

At Oceanside Real Estate Group, we believe luxury is more than a price point—it’s a lifestyle, and it starts with the right guidance. Based in the heart of Los Cabos, we specialize in helping clients find exceptional vacation homes, income-generating investment properties, and permanent residences that align with the lifestyle they’ve worked hard to create. My passion lies in helping people—like you—make confident real estate decisions that elevate your way of living.

Los Cabos is more than a destination; it’s a unique blend of natural beauty, cultural richness, and modern luxury. With a quick flight from the U.S., Cabo offers year-round sunshine, pristine beaches, world-class golf, and five-star amenities—all wrapped in a warm, welcoming community. Unlike more commercialized destinations, Cabo delivers an intimate, high-end experience that continues to attract business professionals, retirees, and global travelers seeking something truly special.

With deep knowledge of both U.S. and Mexican real estate markets, our team is uniquely equipped to support international buyers and sellers. We handle every detail with integrity, professionalism, and a tailored approach—whether you’re buying, selling, or exploring investment opportunities. Our goal is to make the process seamless and rewarding from start to finish.

If you’re ready to explore what life in Cabo could look like—or if you’re a real estate professional with a passion for service and a desire to grow with a top-tier team—we’d love to connect.

Visit www.oceansideloscabos.com to explore our listings or reach out directly to start a conversation. Your dream lifestyle in Los Cabos is closer than you think.
